event: Barges on the Saint Martin Canal
description: An impressionist landscape depicting several flat-bottomed barges moored along a tree-lined canal. The barges are painted in warm yellows and browns. Bare or budding trees line the right bank, and buildings are visible on both sides in the background. The sky is blue with white clouds, rendered in loose brushstrokes. The water reflects the colors of the boats and sky. The overall atmosphere is bright and fresh, suggesting early spring.

_meta.title: Barges on the Saint Martin Canal
